prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PRB18THSFRT-11PC Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 10pc Universal Tool Titanium High Speed Steel Precison Router Bits Description: The 10pc Mini Router Bits Set is a great addition to any hobbyist's tool collection. This set of drill bits are ideal for carpentry, home improvement, crafts and endless other projects.

Each drill is constructed of high speed steel and is titanium coated. They are all compatible with Dremel tools, and each has a 1/8" 3mm shank.

This set of drill bits comes in a sturdy wooden box for easy transportation and storage while not in use. Grab a set of these bits before your next project, or gift them to your favorite carpenter. Search Terms: wood working glass drill bit tools stone drilling tile Features: - 10 Piece Assorted Router Bits - High Speed Steel construction - Titanium Coated - Sturdy Wooden Box for Storage - Size: 1/8" Shank (3mm) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 10-pk 1/8" Mini Router Bits Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: High Speed Steel, Titanium Coated, Dremel Compatible, Wooden Storage Box

openai.title_differentiation: High Speed Steel, Titanium Coated, 18" Shank, Dremel Compatible, Wooden Storage Box, 10 Assorted Bits
